class.help: Registra los medios de Locomoción de cada Postulante
class.label: Medio Locomoción
class.name: MEDIO_LOC

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_medio_loc as oi_medio_loc, t0.c_medio_loc as c_medio_loc, t0.d_medio_loc as d_medio_loc, SEC.policy, t0.c_medio_loc as CODE, t0.d_medio_loc as TEXT FROM SEL21_MEDIOS_LOC as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Medios_Locomocion.MEDIO_LOC\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_medio_loc LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_medio_loc asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_medio_loc as oi_medio_loc, SEC.policy FROM SEL21_MEDIOS_LOC as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Medios_Locomocion.MEDIO_LOC\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_medio_loc LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_medio_loc asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Medios_Locomocion.MEDIO_LOC.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Medios_Locomocion.MEDIO_LOC.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL21_MEDIOS_LOC.oi_medio_loc) as CNT from SEL21_MEDIOS_LOC Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL21_MEDIOS_LOC.oi_medio_loc={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL21_MEDIOS_LOC.d_medio_loc,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL21_MEDIOS_LOC.c_medio_loc,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
